document_references.description: Brief note documenting the social care referral closure. Confirms outcomes of referral to Rose City Community Services: SNAP benefits approved ($430/month for household of three), weekly food pantry enrollment at Rose City pantry site active since early April, TriMet HOP card transit vouchers received and used. Maria reports feeling less stressed about end-of-month food budgets. Conditions and medications unchanged. Next routine visit: annual wellness exam March 2027.
